news.t: Europe Is Pricier This Summer. Its Stocks Aren't.

holdings.infoBox: FYLD is an equity ETF with a total of 106 individual holdings. The top holdings are Saipem SpA stock at 1.64%, Subsea 7 at 1.56%, First American Treasury Obligations Fund Class X at 1.55%, Höegh Autoliners ASA at 1.48%, and NGK Corporation at 1.44%.

overview.description: The Cambria Foreign Shareholder Yield ETF (FYLD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to invest in Developed Ex-US stocks with focus on shareholder yield, as measured by dividend payments and net share buybacks. FYLD was launched on Dec 3, 2013 and is issued by Cambria.

data.title: Europe Is Pricier This Summer. Its Stocks Aren't.
data.text: So far this year international stocks are handily beating their U.S. counterparts. They still have room to run.
